title: Modern_Landscaping
description: Adds bark Chips and Gravels to match vanilla logs and stone variants.
body:
This mod adds Additional ground cover blocks to use in more modern style architectural masterpieces.

As of the 1.1 Release: Added slab varients of all the bark chip blocks and gravel blocks. Also added version suport for 1.19.2

As of the 1.0 release, the mod adds:

10 new gravel varients, each one color matched to its vanilla stone.

7 new barck chip items and blocks, each one color matched to its vanilla log.

The "Gravel Hammer" which is crafted with three sticks and two iron ingots and is used ot crush stone blocks into the gravel counterparts. Simply right click on a stone block while wielding the hammer in your main hand.



Bark is obtained by stripping the bark from logs with an axe but now in addition to stripping the log, you'll also recieve the bark. 



The bark can be composted, used as a fuel source, or crafted into bark chip blocks for decorative landscaping.

Craft a bark block with 9 bark chips of the same type.
